name: Spa Faustino Gran
description: The hammam and indoor pool at the Faustino Gran occupy the vault of an old grotto, at the heart of a 16th-century palace in Ciutadella's old town. Quiet luxury in its purest form: stone, water and silence.

highlights: A water circuit beneath the vault of a historic grotto (indoor pool, sauna, steam room)
Massages and facial and body rituals in two treatment rooms
A 16th-century Relais & Châteaux palace with an olive-tree courtyard in the heart of the old town
